message:
feat(shell): add python, pip, tmux, tmuxinator, systemd, rsync plugins to OMZ

These commonly-used plugins are now included by default in the ACFS zsh
configuration. All are bundled with oh-my-zsh and require no extra setup.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -62,6 +62,12 @@ plugins=(
   command-not-found
   docker
   docker-compose
+  python
+  pip
+  tmux
+  tmuxinator
+  systemd
+  rsync
   zsh-autosuggestions
   zsh-syntax-highlighting
 )
